steps.description: Click the "Source Control" icon in the left sidebar of the Visual Studio Code workspace to open the Source Control panel.
Click on the "Microsoft 365 Agents" extension entry in the INSTALLED section of the Extensions panel in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Uninstall" button for the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension in the Visual Studio Code Extensions sidebar.
Click the "Install" button for the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension in the Visual Studio Code Extensions marketplace sidebar.
Click the "Install Release Version" button for the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension in the Visual Studio Code Extensions Marketplace sidebar.
Click the "Switch to Pre-Release Version" button for the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in the Visual Studio Code Extensions sidebar, highlighted by a blue button with a flag icon.
Click the "Install Specific Version..." option in the context menu for the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within the Extensions panel of Visual Studio Code.
Type '6.0.0' into the version selection input field at the top of the Visual Studio Code Extensions sidebar to filter available extension versions.
Press the Enter key in the Visual Studio Code Extensions search bar after typing "6.0.0" to execute the search query.
Click the "Restart Extension" button for the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in the Visual Studio Code Extensions panel.
Click the "Update to v4.2" button for the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension in the Visual Studio Code Extensions panel to initiate the update process.
Click the "Restart Extensions" blue button in the top bar of the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension page within the Visual Studio Code Extensions view to enable the updated extension.
Click the checkbox to enable or disable the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension in the Visual Studio Code Extensions panel.
Click the "Changelog" button in the notification panel at the bottom right of the Visual Studio Code window to view update details for Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
